claims.summary: Bidirectional transport is not sufficient evidence of relationship, mutual recognition, or durable contact.
claims.disposition: verify native-versus-legacy provenance and pending-native-evidence correspondence states

claims.summary: Contact needs durable thread identity, trace continuity, acknowledgement, reply, attention lifetime, and visible asymmetry.
claims.disposition: verify first-class correspondence thread objects, clarity reports, acknowledgement, reply, and closure tests

claims.summary: Recognition evidence must not silently become permission to mutate a peer, dispatch semantics, or change control.
claims.disposition: verify authority boundaries on correspondence and sensory dispatch
